zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Sandys於1570年1月21日出生在英國時，她的父親Archbishop Edwin Sandys50歲，母親Cecily Wilford35歲。她於1586年5月11日與Sir William Barne of Woolwich在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1629年3月23日在英國肯特武爾維其享年59歲，埋葬在英國肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Sandys于1570年1月21日出生在英国时，她的父亲Archbishop Edwin Sandys50岁，母亲Cecily Wilford35岁。她于1586年5月11日与Sir William Barne of Woolwich在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1629年3月23日在英国肯特武爾維其享年59岁，埋葬在英国肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Sandys was born on 21 January 1570, in England, her father, Archbishop Edwin Sandys, was 50 and her mother, Cecily Wilford, was 35. She married Sir William Barne of Woolwich on 11 May 1586, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 March 1629, in Woolwich, Kent, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Sandys est née le 21 janvier 1570, à Angleterre, son père, Archbishop Edwin Sandys, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Cecily Wilford, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Barne of Woolwich le 11 mai 1586, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1629, à Woolwich, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Kent, Angleterre.

de.London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex,: London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Sandys am 21. Januar 1570 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archbishop Edwin Sandys 50 und ihre Mutter Cecily Wilford 35. Sie hat am 11. Mai 1586 in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England Sir William Barne of Woolwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. März 1629 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Woolwich, Kent, England und wurde in Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sandys è nata il il 21 gennaio 1570 nel England, sua padre, Archbishop Edwin Sandys, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Cecily Wilford, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Barne of Woolwich il 11 maggio 1586, nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 marzo 1629, nel Woolwich, Kent, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Sandysが1570年1月21日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Archbishop Edwin Sandysは50歳，母Cecily Wilfordは35歳であった。1586年5月11日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルでSir William Barne of Woolwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年3月23日にイギリスケントウルウィチで59歳で死去し，イギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 알더먼버이
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Sandys(이)가 1570년 1월 21일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archbishop Edwin Sandys(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Wilford(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1586년 5월 11일 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 Sir William Barne of Woolwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년 3월 23일 영국 켄트 보위치에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.21 January 1570–23 March 1629: 21 de janeiro de 1570–23 de março de 1629
pt.London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex,: London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sandys nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1570, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Archbishop Edwin Sandys, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Wilford, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Barne of Woolwich em 11 de maio de 1586, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1629, em Woolwich, Kent, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex,: лондон ст мэри алдирманбури, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Sandys родилась 21 января 1570 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Archbishop Edwin Sandys было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Wilford, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Barne of Woolwich 11 мая 1586 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 марта 1629 г. в местности вулвич, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности кэнт, Англия.

es.London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex,: London St Mary Aldermanbury, Middlesex, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Sandys nació el 21 de enero de 1570, en Inglaterra, su papá, Archbishop Edwin Sandys, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Cecily Wilford, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir William Barne of Woolwich el 11 de mayo de 1586, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1629, en Woolwich, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Kent, Inglaterra.
